response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the entire video for vocal music. 2. Confirmed that the audio consists exclusively of conversational dialogue between VTubers in a Minecraft game setting; no songs with vocals are present. 3. Defined scene boundaries based on changes in gameplay activity and location. 4. Since no vocal music exists, all musical metadata and lyrics fields are set to null.
response.global_summary: The video shows a group of VTubers playing a custom Minecraft game, looting chests, managing money at a bank/ATM, and completing a dungeon challenge together. The audio consists entirely of conversational dialogue between the players.

scenes.description: The VTubers explore a room, looting chests to gather equipment. There is no background vocal music.
The players transition to the main hub area of the game. No background vocal music.
The players interact with an in-game bank/ATM to deposit currency. No background vocal music.
The group roams the hub area and discusses shopping. No background vocal music.
The players enter a dungeon, battle various mobs, and successfully defeat a challenge. No background vocal music.
